arts.ttl: Premier League GW30 predictions: Liverpool to triumph in Merseyside derby, Man United to lose at Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes on Chris Buck from electrifying Welsh-formed rock trio Cardinal Black for a Premier League predictions challenge in gameweek 30 of the 2024-25 season.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney reveals how he spurned approaches from Real Madrid and Barcelona as Man United legend urges Liverpool fans to lay off Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney has revealed just how close he came to leaving Man United for Spain and says he can understand why Trent Alexander-Arnold may be tempted to join Real Madrid this summer.

arts.ttl: Team News: Nottingham Forest vs. Manchester United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Premier League clash between Nottingham Forest and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Nuno Espirito Santo issues Chris Wood injury update ahead of Man United clash
arts.sum: Manchester United will take on Nottingham Forest in their return to Premier League football following the March international break

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho update as 'offer' made by European club for Manchester United forward, with Ruben Amorim considering sale
arts.sum: Manchester United may need to brace themselves for the departure of Alejandro Garnacho following reports of an offer for the winger made to the Red Devils.

arts.ttl: Seven players set to miss Nottingham Forest vs Manchester United as Ruben Amorim update given
arts.sum: Man United face Nottingham Forest at the City Ground on Tuesday night (8pm kick-off) with both teams set to be without key players through injury.

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Nottingham Forest - Premier League
arts.sum: Man Utd's predicted starting lineup for their Premier League clash at Nottingham Forest on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer and Gary Lineker thought one Nottingham Forest star was 'unbelievable' vs Brighton
Man United star could make emotional Ajax return this summer as Dutch club chief reveals interest
arts.sum: Christian Eriksen is being lined up for a return to his former club Ajax according to the Eredivisie leaders' director of football. The 33-year-old is out of contract at Man United in June.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's Manchester United injury update ahead of Nottingham Forest clash highlights long-term problem at club
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim provides an injury update ahead of his side's Premier League clash against Nottingham Forest on Tuesday, and his comments highlight a long-term issue.
